Home › About Us
Brooklyn, NY · Since 2010

Bringing West Indian
flavors to Brooklyn

K&G Market is a family-owned Caribbean grocery store committed to delivering authentic, fresh, and carefully sourced products to our community.

15+
Years serving Brooklyn
500+
Products available
10K+
Happy customers
Our Mission
Serving our community with authenticity
To provide our Brooklyn community with the freshest, most authentic Caribbean and West Indian products — hand-selected daily with care and pride.
Our Vision
The go-to Caribbean market in New York
To become the leading Caribbean grocery destination in New York City, known for unmatched quality, authenticity and the warmth of our community roots.
Our Promise
Quality, freshness and authenticity — always
Every product we carry is carefully selected for its quality, freshness and authenticity. From trusted growers to your table — we deliver flavor you can trust.
Our Story

A Caribbean heart
in the heart of Brooklyn

K&G Market was born from a simple but powerful idea: everyone in Brooklyn deserves access to the authentic flavors of the Caribbean — fresh, affordable, and sourced with integrity.

What started as a small neighborhood stand on Church Avenue has grown into a beloved community institution. For over 15 years, we have served thousands of families with the fruits, vegetables, spices and pantry staples that remind them of home.

We hand-select every product, work directly with trusted growers, and open our doors every single day because we believe good food brings people together.
